name: Samurai Flash 3D
description: It is a popular casual competitive game. In the game, the player will act as an excellent samurai, choose a reasonable attack method according to the opponent's weapon and attack attributes, collect equipment to improve their attributes and guarantee their safety, become the reaper on the battlefield, and reach the end safely.
tags: 3D, 3D Games, Boy, Boys, Fun, H5, HTML5, Kid, Kids, run, running
